data.Vulnerability: An issue was discovered in libsixel 1.8.4. There is a heap-based buffer overflow in the function gif_init_frame at fromgif.c.
libsixel 1.8.6 suffers from a Heap Use After Free vulnerability in in libsixel/src/dither.c:388.
data.Exploit command: img2sixel -o ./a.sixel -8 -p 1 -C 10 -d fs -f auto -s auto -t auto CVE-2022-27046_poc

data.Vulnerability: There is a floating point exception error in sixel_encoder_do_resize, encoder.c:633 in libsixel img2sixel 1.8.6. Remote attackers could leverage this vulnerability to cause a denial-of-service via a crafted JPEG file.
